column1: AI Agent Governance RACI v0.1 | NIST AI RMF - OWASP Agentic Top 10 (2026) - Agent 365
ZTA Check IDs link to ZTA Findings tab - Status auto-reflects last assessment - RACI: R=Responsible A=Accountable C=Consulted I=Informed

column5: Control Name & Description
Entra Agent ID - Unique Identity Registration. Every agent must have a registered Entra Agent ID with owner, version, lifecycle status.
Maintain authoritative registry; detect unauthorised agents via Agent 365.
Classify agent actions by risk tier; define mandatory human approval gates.
Approve, version, and audit all MCP servers; block unapproved tools.
Apply ZT principles: verify agent identity explicitly, least privilege, assume breach.
column6: Entra ID / Defender XDR / ZT for AI Framework

column5: Memory Context Attack Surface Mapping - identify memory stores; map injection and persistence risk vectors.
column6: Azure AI Foundry / Defender for Cloud AI

column5: Map all A2A calls, orchestrator-subagent relationships, and trust propagation.
Indirect Prompt Injection via External Data - map all external data sources feeding agent context; classify injection risk.
column6: Defender for Cloud AI / AI Red Teaming Agent

column5: Tool Permission Blast Radius Analysis - map worst-case action scope per tool; enforce least-privilege tool scopes.
Reversible vs. Irreversible Action Taxonomy - classify all agent-callable actions by reversibility and blast radius.
Monitor Entra Agent ID for privilege escalation, token reuse, out-of-policy scope.
Implement integrity hashing and anomaly detection on memory stores.
column6: Defender for Cloud / Azure Key Vault / Sentinel

column5: Measure % of high-risk actions routed to human review; alert on bypass.
Monitor for AI supply chain TTPs - model substitution, poisoned RAG, malicious plugins (e.g. Sapphire Sleet).
Agent Tool Usage Telemetry & Drift Detection - track tool call patterns; flag deviations from baseline; detect privilege creep.
Validate 100% of agent actions logged with actor, timestamp, tool, parameters.
Implement and test agent circuit-breaker controls; immediate credential revocation.
column6: Entra Agent ID / Agent Governance Toolkit

column5: Memory Poisoning Incident Response - playbook for detecting, containing, flushing poisoned memory; restore from verified snapshot.
Least Privilege Remediation & Tool Scope Reduction - quarterly review of agent tool permissions; enforce scope reduction.
Agent Prompt Injection Containment Playbook - isolation, memory flush, credential rotation, root cause analysis steps.
Agent Lifecycle Decommission & Credential Revocation - revoke Entra ID, purge memory, archive logs, notify owners.
